snapback.protectionLevels.defaultLevel.description: Default protection level when protecting new files

snapback.protectionLevels.showLevelBadge.description: Show protection level badges in file explorer

snapback.notifications.showSnapshotCreat.description: Show notification when snapshots are created (Watch level only)

snapback.onboarding.showWelcome.description: Show welcome experience on first run

snapback.onboarding.autoDetectCriticalFi.description: Automatically suggest protection for critical files (package.json, .env, etc.)

snapback.showAutoCheckpointNotifications.description: Show notifications when auto-snapshots are created for protected files

snapback.snapshot.naming.useGit.description: Use git context for intelligent snapshot naming

snapback.snapshot.deletion.confirmDelete.description: Show confirmation dialog before deleting snapshots

olderThanDays.description: Delete snapshots older than this many days

keepProtected.description: Keep protected snapshots even if old

snapback.snapshot.deduplication.enabled.description: Automatically replace duplicate snapshots with identical file states

snapback.snapshot.deduplication.cacheSiz.description: Maximum number of snapshot hashes to cache for deduplication

snapback.config.enableExecutableConfigs.description: Enable loading of executable configuration files (CJS/MJS). WARNING: Only enable in trusted environments as this can execute arbitrary code.
